name: mcp-schema-watch
description: Polls the MCP servers you depend on and alerts when a tool's schema changes in a breaking way.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test test/diffTools.test.ts test/normalize.test.ts test/polling/pollAndRecordServer.test.ts && node --import tsx --test test/db/watchedServers.repo.test.ts && node --import tsx --test test/db/snapshots.repo.test.ts && node --import tsx --test test/db/diffs.repo.test.ts && node --import tsx --test test/db/pollFailures.repo.test.ts
